video_type.reasoning: Single speaker (SPEAKER_00) delivers educational monologue about approach anxiety for entire video. Zero approaches to women. References teaching programs, boot camps, students. Classic instructional content.

transcript_confidence.reasoning: Mostly coherent and followable. Some segments have minor ASR issues (run-on text, missing punctuation). Segment 150 is abnormally long (28s) suggesting failed segmentation. Early segments (0-15) are fragmented but still understandable. Overall content is clear.

SPEAKER_00.reasoning: Dominates entire video with instructional content about approach anxiety. References his virtual instruction program, boot camps in Columbus, Instagram coaching. Uses 'guys' addressing audience.

SPEAKER_01.reasoning: Single brief interjection 'You make people feel good' — likely audience member or friend agreeing with coach's point.

UNKNOWN.reasoning: Single segment at end saying 'Thanks for watching!' — likely outro/channel sign-off, possibly different speaker or same coach.
